---
title: "dsci_II_project"
author: "Heather Lu"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)      
library(caret)          
library(glmnet)         
library(mgcv)           
library(earth)          
library(randomForest)   
library(gbm)            
library(gtsummary)      
library(corrplot)       
library(ggplot2)        
```

# Load data & EDA
```{r}
# load data 
load("datA.RData")
str(datA)
sum(is.na(datA))

# check outcome distribution 
hist(datA$log_PFS, main = "Distribution of Log_PFS", xlab = "log_PFS")
```
